l2_description: Color sorting with 2 frames and portal. 7 items, 7 targets. Frame1 slots: (20,20)=color12, (26,20)=color15, PORTAL(14) at (32,20), (38,20)=color6. Frame2 slots: (20,34)=color8, (26,34)=color9, (32,34)=color14, (38,34)=color11. Place items matching target colors left-to-right, portal routes to Frame2.
